title: 留心笔记
subTitle: 雁过留声，风过留痕
allHead: <script src='../assets/RonanTheme.js'></script><script src='../assets/GmeekVercount.js'></script><script async src='https://cdn.seline.com/seline.js' data-token='980dcab9ed188b4'></script><script　src='https://app.rybbit.io/api/script.js'　data-site-id='07c1f2ea718b'　defer></script><script async src='https://pagead2.googlesyndication.com/pagead/js/adsbygoogle.js?client=ca-pub-9661896697976587' crossorigin='anonymous'></script>
script: <script src='../assets/ArticleTOC.js'></script><script src='../assets/lightbox.js'></script><script src='../assets/oneko.js/oneko.js' data-cat='../assets/oneko.js/oneko.gif'></script><script>document.querySelectorAll('a').forEach(anchor => {const img = anchor.querySelector('img');if (img && img.hasAttribute('data-canonical-src')) {const canonicalSrc = img.getAttribute('data-canonical-src');anchor.setAttribute('href', canonicalSrc);img.setAttribute('src', canonicalSrc);img.removeAttribute('data-canonical-src');}});</script><script>const postTitle=document.querySelector('.postTitle').textContent;fetch('../blogBase.json').then(res=>res.json()).then(data=>{const posts=data.postListJson;const keys=Object.keys(posts).reverse();let index=-1;for(let i=0;i<keys.length;i++){if(posts[keys[i]].postTitle===postTitle){index=i;break;}}if(index!==-1){const nav=document.createElement('nav');nav.style.display='flex';nav.style.justifyContent='space-between';nav.style.marginTop='20px';const prev=posts[keys[index-1]];const next=posts[keys[index+1]];if(prev){const a=document.createElement('a');a.href='../'+prev.postUrl;a.innerHTML='<button class="btn" type="button">← '+prev.postTitle+'</button>';nav.appendChild(a);}else{nav.appendChild(document.createElement('div'));}if(next){const a=document.createElement('a');a.href='../'+next.postUrl;a.innerHTML='<button class="btn" type="button">'+next.postTitle+' →</button>';nav.appendChild(a);}document.getElementById('postBody').after(nav);}});</script>
bottomText: ❤️ 转载文章请注明出处，谢谢！❤️
